sections.heading: What is Image Optimization?
sections.body: Formats, compression, responsive images, srcset, and WebP/AVIF. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Image Optimization is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Image Optimization is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Image Optimization every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Image Optimization implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Image Optimization is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
